last_fix.description: Fixed 2 malformed TOD rules that were added with wrong schema (id vs rule_id, no conditions dict, adjustment=0). Runtime engine was loading them as rule_id='?' adj=0 — completely inert. Reformatted to proper GraduatedRule schema: tod_evening_edge_v1 {hour_utc_min:18, hour_utc_max:24, adj:+5.0} and tod_afternoon_edge_v1 {hour_utc_min:12, hour_utc_max:18, adj:+5.0}. Verified: engine test shows correct BOOST+5.0 firing.
